mapw_3d_change_texture.help_text: Change the texture of the currently selected wall(s) and/or flat(s)

mapw_3d_wall_properties.help_text: Edit the currently selected wall (line) properties

mapw_3d_flat_properties.help_text: Edit the currently selected flat (sector) properties

mapw_3d_thing_properties.help_text: Edit the currently selected thing properties

mapw_3d_thing_change_type.help_text: Change the type of the currently selected thing(s)
